name: card
title: Card
description: General and settings-compatible card chrome — width + matching min-height tokens, header (title + actions slot), and a flex body that fills leftover space.

appearance.description: Chrome recipe — `editing` applies the settings edit wash.

cardWidth.description:
Card width token (`sm` / `md` / `lg`). Also sets host `min-height` to the
matching `--dimension-card-height-*` so empty bodies still fill the card.

heading.description: Section heading shown in the card header.

appearance.description: Chrome recipe — `editing` applies the settings edit wash.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
